narrative:
Massillon 1-E (precinct in Stark County) has 687 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
